## 📝 Describe the bug

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->
**What happened?**

**What did you expect to happen?**

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

<!-- Tell us how to trigger the bug. Be as specific as possible. -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

---

## 📱 Device Information

<!-- Please complete the following information about your device. -->

**Device model:** (e.g., Pixel 6, Samsung Galaxy S22)
**Android version:** (e.g., Android 13)
**App version:** (e.g., v1.0.0 – you can find this in Settings → bottom of page)

**Are you using a tablet?** Yes / No
**If yes, approximate screen size:** (e.g., 10.5")

---

## 📸 Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain your problem. You can attach images directly to this issue. -->

<details>
<summary><strong>📎 Attach files here</strong></summary>
<br>
<p>Drag and drop images or videos into this comment box, or click "Attach files" below.</p>
</details>

---

## 📊 Account & Sync

**Are you signed into an account?** Yes / No
**If yes, did the bug happen after syncing?** Yes / No / Not sure

**Does the bug happen on a specific month?** (e.g., only in March 2026)

---

## 🔧 Additional Context

<!-- Any other information that might help us debug the issue. For example: -->
- Did the app crash? If so, did you see any error message?
- Were you offline when the bug occurred?
- Does the bug happen every time or only sometimes?
